subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost gird up thy loins in service to the Cause of God! The verses of thanksgiving have been chanted in the Concourse on High for the support thou hast rendered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشمر عن الذیل فی خدمه امر الله قد رتلت ایات الشکر للملا الاعلی بما اید
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
